summary: Backend testing for tenant-isolated routes and PII field encryption. All 14 core features verified working: Houses (leaderboard/award), O-Week (data/activities), Finance (bills/summary), AI suggestions, and Safe Disclosure with AES-256-GCM encryption. Authentication and role-based access control working correctly.

minor.issue: student1@ormond.com account locked due to rate limiting during tests. Used student2@ormond.com instead.
minor.note: Password in review_request (AbC!123!) differs from actual (Quadley2025!)

preferred_contact encrypted in database (starts with enc:)

decrypt_field correctly decrypts enc: prefixed values

Students can access read-only endpoints (leaderboard, o-week/data, bills)

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Field encryption (field_encryption.py) uses AES-256-GCM with 12-byte nonce
✓ Key derivation from JWT_SECRET via SHA-256 is secure
✓ encrypt_field idempotent - already encrypted values returned as-is
✓ Houses routes use get_tenant_db_for_user for tenant isolation
✓ O-Week routes use get_tenant_db_for_user for tenant isolation
✓ Finance routes use get_tenant_db_for_user for tenant isolation
✓ AI suggestions route uses get_tenant_db_for_user for tenant isolation
✓ Safe disclosure encrypts preferred_contact on write (line 118)
✓ Safe disclosure decrypts preferred_contact on read (lines 138-139, 160-162, 814-815)
✓ Role checks properly enforce admin/RA only access where required
seed_data_creation: Created test house points, O-Week activities, and safe disclosures with encrypted preferred_contact
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tenant-isolated routes (houses, oweek, finance, ai_suggestions) working correctly with get_tenant_db_for_user dependency. Field encryption (AES-256-GCM) verified - data stored encrypted (enc: prefix) in MongoDB, decrypted on API return. Role-based access control working - students get 403 on admin-only endpoints. Note: student1@ormond.com may still be locked, use student2@ormond.com for testing. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_tenant_isolated_routes.py
